title: 6 Pcs Transparent Plastic Merchandises Sign Clip Rotatable Double,Signs Clips Merchandise Sign Display Rotatables Merchandise,Mini Clip Tag Holders for Business Cards
features: PACKAGE CONTENTS: Set of 6 transparent plastic display clips with double-sided rotatable design for versatile merchandise presentation
VERSATILE USE: Perfect for displaying business cards, price tags, merchandise labels, promotional signs and small paper materials
ROTATABLE DESIGN: 360-degree rotating mechanism allows for flexible viewing angles and easy adjustment of displayed items
DURABLE CONSTRUCTION: Made from sturdy transparent plastic that provides clear visibility while maintaining firm grip on displayed items
DIMENSIONS: Each clip measures 5 cm in length with strong gripping mechanism suitable for materials up to 2 mm thick
description: Product Description 6 Pcs Transparent Plastic Merchandise Sign Clip Rotatable Double Clip These versatile transparent plastic sign display clips are perfect for showcasing business cards, price tags, merchandise information, and promotional materials in retail settings. Each pack includes 6 pieces of double-sided rotatable clips that offer flexible display options. The clips feature a clever rotatable design, allowing you to adjust the viewing angle for optimal visibility. Their transparent construction ensures your displayed items remain the focal point whilst maintaining a professional appearance. These practical holders are ideal for retail shops, offices, exhibitions, or any setting where clear product information display is essential. The sturdy plastic construction provides reliable grip strength to securely hold your cards and signs, whilst the transparent design seamlessly blends with any décor. 6 Pcs Transparent Plastic Merchandise Sign Clip Rotatable Double Clip These versatile transparent plastic sign display clips are perfect for showcasing business cards, price tags, merchandise information, and promotional materials in retail settings.
